infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ICHS needs camera access to capture crop images for diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ICHS needs photo library access so you can choose crop images for diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ICHS may save captured crop photos to your library when needed.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ICHS uses your location to provide hyper-local alerts and weather risk.
